projectDescription: A multi-service safety and crowd intelligence platform for Kolkata suburban trains, combining real-time crowd prediction, Neo4j-backed route search, and AI-assisted FIR complaint filing.
keyFeatures: Real-time crowd prediction using signal fusion (historical, trend, live reports, weather)
Neo4j graph-backed train route search with via-station support
Random Forest ML model for crowd level prediction (SAFE/CAUTION/AVOID)
Conversational AI FIR complaint filing with multilingual support (English, Hindi, Bengali)
AI-assisted crime categorization and legal section recommendation using Groq LLM + RAG
Police dashboard for FIR management, analytics, and status tracking
Progressive Web App (PWA) manifest for mobile installation
Rate limiting and duplicate complaint detection for FIR submissions
publicApiSurface: POST /api/trains/search — search trains between stations with crowd badges
POST /api/trains/predict — predict crowd for a given travel time
POST /api/trains/report — submit a live crowd report
GET /api/trains/{train_number}/stops — get all stops for a train
GET /api/trains/ml-compare/{train_number} — 24-hour ML vs historical comparison
GET /api/stats — crowd report distribution statistics
GET /api/weather — current weather signal for Kolkata
GET /api/stations — list all stations from Neo4j
POST /fir/start — start a conversational FIR session
POST /fir/reply — continue an FIR conversation session
GET /fir/download/{session_id} — download generated FIR PDF
GET /fir/status/{session_id} — check session status
GET /fir/all — list all FIRs for police dashboard
PATCH /fir/update-status/{session_id} — update FIR status
GET /fir/analytics — FIR analytics data
POST /fir/actions — get action options for an incident
POST /fir/chat — Groq+RAG general safety chatbot
POST /ai/suggest-categories — AI complaint categorization
POST /ai/detect-train — detect train number from free text
POST /resources — get police stations, helplines, and legal info by crime type
GET /police-station — get nearest railway police station
GET /languages — list supported languages
